key_benefits: You will earn 2 Delight Points for every 150 spent by you using your Aspire Platinum Card; so enjoy on travelling, shopping, dining-out or watching movies, get rewarded for all your spends
fuel: Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using IDBI Bank Aspire Platinum Card across all fuel stations for transactions in the range of 400 to 4000. So keep driving and enjoying with friends and family. *Maximum waiver of upto 300 per month
insurance: In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Customer Care 1800 425 7600 (Toll free) / 022 - 4042 6013 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank.
welcome_benefits: welcome gift of 500 Delight Points on first usage of the card within 30 days or 300 Delight Points on usage between 31 to 90 days from the card issuance date.
eligibility: Primary card holder should be in the age bracket of 21 years to 60 years (65 years for self-employed). Add-on card holder should be 18 years and above Should be a resident of India

key_benefits: You can earn 6 Delight Points for every 100 you spend on travel related expenses viz. Hotels, Airlines, IRCTC, Bus Bookings etc. or earn 3 Delight Points on every other spent, which can be redeemed against a wide range of handpicked gifts and souvenirs to suit your lifestyle and preferences
fuel: Waiver of 1%* fuel surcharge every time you fill fuel using IDBI Bank World Card across all fuel stations for transactions in the range of Rs. 400 to Rs. 5000. So keep driving and enjoying with friends and family. *Maximum waiver of upto Rs. 500 per month
insurance: IDBI Bank Euphoria World Credit Card provides an air travel accident insurance cover worth Rs. 25 lakhs to put your mind at ease while you travel for business or leisure. In case of loss of credit card, report it immediately at our 24-Hour Customer Care 1800 425 7600 (Toll free) / 022 - 4042 6013 (Non-toll free). The card will be immediately blocked for all transactions to prevent card misuse. Any fraudulent transaction after reporting the loss will be covered by the Bank.
lounge_access: Enjoy luxury at select airport lounges in India. No matter which airline or class you fly, your Euphoria World card offers you well deserved rest and use of facilities. You will surely find it useful to relieve travel fatigue and escape airport chaos. The airport lounge access is being provided by master and is subject to change as per MasterCard discretion from time to time without any prior notice. IDBI Bank Euphoria World Credit Card offers unlimited complimentary lounge visits at participating Airport Lounges in India.
eligibility: Primary card holder should be in the age bracket of 21 years to 60 years (65 years for self-employed). Add-on card holder should be 18 years and above Should be a resident of India
